nasb.text: They said to Joshua, “Surely the Lord has given all the land into our hands; moreover, all the inhabitants of the land have melted away before us.”

esv.text: And they said to Joshua, “Truly the Lord has given all the land into our hands. And also, all the inhabitants of the land melt away because of us.”

cnv.text: 他們又對約書亞說：“耶和華真的把那地全交在我們手裡了；那地所有的居民都在我們面前膽戰心驚。”

ccb.text: 又说：“耶和华确实将那整片土地交给我们了，那里的居民听到我们的消息，都吓得胆战心惊。”
